post.description: The actor comes exclusively from the auth context; displayedConsentText is only a cross-check against the server-side versioned consent text. Replay with the same Idempotency-Key returns the identical 201 response.

parameters.name: x-customer-id
parameters.description: Authenticated customer (must match the path).

parameters.description: Acting user in the calling tool.

parameters.name: x-actor-role
parameters.description: Portal role, logged with the evidence.

400.description: Missing Idempotency-Key / body validation failed (strict schema).

401.description: Missing/invalid service token or customer context.

403.description: FORBIDDEN — path customerId does not match the auth context.

401.description: Missing/invalid service token or customer context.

post.summary: Record an objection — PASSIVE versions within the objection period only (Idempotency-Key required)

post.description: notifiedAt is set to SERVER time, atomically and only from PENDING_NOTIFICATION. displayedAt is a plausibility check only. Naturally idempotent (no key needed).

parameters.name: x-customer-id
parameters.description: Authenticated customer (must match the path).

parameters.name: x-actor-user-id
parameters.description: Acting user in the calling tool.

parameters.name: x-actor-role
parameters.description: Portal role, logged with the evidence.

401.description: Missing/invalid service token or customer context.

403.description: FORBIDDEN — path customerId does not match the auth context.

post.summary: Report delivery ("popup was displayed") — starts the deadline

post.description: Creates a customer, optionally recording versions the customer already accepted out-of-band (e.g. by signing an offer) as IMPORT acceptances in the same call. A `roles` change takes effect on the next publish/rollout only. `externalRef` is unique only among customers with OVERLAPPING roles (the partner and customer external ID spaces are separate): a duplicate that shares at least one role returns 422 INVALID_STATE — integrators can treat that as the idempotency signal per overlapping role set. Use distinct refs per audience space, or GET first, to avoid ambiguity.

400.description: Body validation failed (strict schema — no actor fields in the body).

422.description: INVALID_STATE (externalRef duplicate sharing a role / invalid input) · UNKNOWN_AUDIENCE · ROLE_MISMATCH

post.description: Archives an externally-signed PDF (e.g. a counter-signed offer) against a customer. The documentType MUST be an external type (422 DOCUMENT_TYPE_NOT_EXTERNAL otherwise — non-external types use the version/clickwrap flow). Signed documents are a pure evidence archive and NEVER affect the compliance gate.
post.summary: Upload an externally-signed document for a customer (integration)

get.summary: List a customer’s signed documents (newest first)

get.description: compliant=false ONLY for EXPIRED_BLOCKING or a not-yet-accepted carry-over state. Without `audience` the result aggregates all of the customer's roles.

parameters.name: x-customer-id
parameters.description: Authenticated customer (must match the path).

parameters.name: x-actor-user-id
parameters.description: Acting user in the calling tool.

parameters.name: x-actor-role
parameters.description: Portal role, logged with the evidence.

parameters.name: audience
parameters.description: Audience key of the calling tool.

401.description: Missing/invalid service token or customer context.

403.description: FORBIDDEN — path customerId does not match the auth context.

get.description: Current PUBLISHED versions with an open state (PENDING_NOTIFICATION | NOTIFIED | EXPIRED_BLOCKING) plus UPCOMING published versions (validFrom in the future, marked `upcoming: true` with their `validFrom`) — acceptance may be collected in advance; the current version stays required until the flip.

parameters.name: x-customer-id
parameters.description: Authenticated customer (must match the path).

parameters.name: x-actor-user-id
parameters.description: Acting user in the calling tool.

parameters.name: x-actor-role
parameters.description: Portal role, logged with the evidence.

parameters.name: audience
parameters.description: Audience key of the calling tool.

401.description: Missing/invalid service token or customer context.

403.description: FORBIDDEN — path customerId does not match the auth context.

get.summary: Popup content — open items for the customer (empty = nothing to show)

get.description: Unauthenticated. The URL is DETERMINISTIC from the document keys (`/documents/<type>/<audience>/latest.pdf`), so it stays valid across every future publish — render it into offers/templates once. Each request redirects (302) to a fresh, time-limited presigned URL of the CURRENTLY EFFECTIVE published version (newest PUBLISHED with validFrom <= now — never an upcoming, not-yet-effective one: an offer must reference what is in force at signing time). Signature on the offer = implicit acceptance; record it later via `acceptedVersions` on customer creation. Side-effect-free: no notification/state/evidence writes.

parameters.name: typeKey
parameters.description: Document type key, e.g. `terms`.

parameters.name: audienceKey
parameters.description: Audience key, e.g. `customer`.

302.description: Redirect to a fresh presigned PDF URL (time-limited).

404.description: Uniform for unknown type/audience/document, no published version, or an only-upcoming version — never reveals which case it was.

get.summary: Stable public link to the latest effective PDF of a document (302 redirect)

get.description: Auth: the link token in the path is the capability — no service token, no headers. Rendering the page counts as provable access: per pending agreement of the link’s customer a NotificationEvent (channel LINK) is recorded and the deadline starts (atomic, first access wins, SUPERSEDED is never revived). Language: `?lang=de|en`, then Accept-Language, default en. Invalid/expired/revoked tokens all render the SAME 404 page.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Capability token from the minted acceptance-link URL.

404.description: Uniform HTML 404 page — never reveals whether the token existed.

429.description: Per-token rate limit exceeded (JSON `{ code: RATE_LIMITED }`).

post.description: Full acceptance flow with channel LINK: current-version check, role coverage, CONSENT_TEXT_MISMATCH cross-check against the server-side versioned consent text. The actor is `link:<linkId>` plus the SELF-DECLARED signer name/e-mail; the evidence note records the self-declaration. Optional Idempotency-Key header (the page sends a random key per attempt).

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Capability token from the minted acceptance-link URL.

post.summary: Record consent from the hosted page (link token = auth, signer self-declared)

post.description: Delivery → sets notifiedAt atomically (deadline starts). Bounce → escalation "unreachable". Unknown MessageIDs and other RecordTypes → 200 no-op (stops redelivery).
post.summary: Postmark delivery/bounce webhook (mounted only when EMAIL_PROVIDER=postmark)

info.title: clickwrap-server — integration API
info.description: Service-to-service surface for the calling tools: compliance gate, pending-agreements popup feed, consent/objection/delivery writes, customer onboarding (`POST /customers`) and the Postmark delivery webhook. Auth: shared `x-service-token`; the customer-scoped routes additionally require the verified context headers (`x-customer-id`, `x-actor-*`) — actor and customer NEVER come from the body. Exception: the hosted acceptance page (`/accept/**`) is authenticated by its capability link token alone (no integration needed). Errors are always `{ code, message }`.

message.example: A customer with externalRef "ext-1" and an overlapping role already exists

displayedConsentText.example: I have read the new revision and agree.
displayedConsentText.description: Cross-check only — the evidence uses the server-side versioned consentText. Required for ACTIVE versions; omitted for a PASSIVE early acceptance.

displayedAt.description: Plausibility check only — notifiedAt is ALWAYS server time (no backdating).

acceptedAt.description: Signature date; backdating is allowed for IMPORT. Defaults to now.

acceptedVersions.description: Versions already accepted out-of-band (signed offer) — recorded as IMPORT acceptances.

firstName.description: Contact person's given name ('' when unknown).

lastName.description: Contact person's family name ('' when unknown).

companyName.description: Optional company/organisation name — preferred display label when set.

deletedAt.description: Set only on a customer that was soft-deleted by the customer sync (removed from the external source). The detail page badges it; such customers are excluded from the list and never blocking.

compliant.description: Compliance gate (domain semantics: false = blocked). Present on list rows only; scoped by the audience/documentType query params (which also narrow the list to assigned/role-matching customers).

complianceStatus.description: Compact per-row compliance status for the list chip. Present on list rows only.

fileName.description: Fallback: PDF file name (only with the base64 `file` fallback).

documentTypeKey.description: DocumentTypeDef key — MUST be an external type.

audience.description: Audience key (validated to exist when given).

contentHash.description: SHA-256 over the PDF, computed host-side.

pdfUrl.description: Time-limited (presigned) download URL of the signed PDF.

audience.description: Audience key the query was restricted to.

compliant.description: false only for EXPIRED_BLOCKING or a not-yet-accepted carry-over state.

details.description: One entry per TYPE_AUDIENCE detail key (e.g. DPA_CUSTOMER).

blocking.description: true → the tool shows the block screen.

upcoming.description: true = published but not yet in effect (validFrom in the future). The current version stays required until the flip; accepting the upcoming one in advance is valid.

validFrom.description: Date from which the revision applies.

displayedConsentText.example: I have read the new revision and agree.
displayedConsentText.description: Exact consent text as displayed — cross-checked server-side (CONSENT_TEXT_MISMATCH). Required for ACTIVE versions; omitted for a PASSIVE early acceptance (no consent checkbox).

signerName.description: Self-declared signer name (typed by the recipient).
